effects.effect:
You can only activate this card if you have 3+ face-down cards in your FP Zone. 
 
When your Opponent would use an Attack Skill: you can negate that Attack Skill, and if you do, apply 1 of these effects: 
• Draw 1 card 
• Heal 70 LP of 1 of your Vivosaurs. 
You can apply both effects if you have "Dynal" in your discard pile.
